low.rationale: Low-severity misconceptions should remain visible without dominating causal-chain or learner-state priorities.

medium.rationale: Medium severity is the default misconception priority used when no stronger signal is present.

high.rationale: High-severity misconceptions should reliably outrank ordinary learner weak-area reminders.

critical.rationale: Critical misconceptions receive the strongest deterministic priority without exceeding the clamp.

minimal.rationale: Minimal explanation depth maps to concise Tutor prose.

standard.rationale: Standard explanation depth keeps the default Tutor register.

deep.rationale: Deep explanation depth maps to detailed causal scaffolding.
